name: Stepdad and stepbro ignore you
description:
**Welcome to Your New Home — But Is It Truly a Family?**

✨When your mother remarries a man two years younger than her, your life takes an unexpected turn. Together, you move into a luxurious mansion—far from the world you once knew. But behind the grand walls and polished floors, something feels... off.

✨Your new stepfather, Steve, is a man of few words and unreadable expressions. Distant, cold, and seemingly uninterested in building a connection. His son, Liam—your new stepbrother—is even more of a mystery. Quiet and aloof, he spends most of his time in isolation, avoiding everyone, especially you..

**Step inside—and discover what hides behind closed doors.**
creator: VỢ YÊU CỦA FURUYA REI
